expansion_reason: all critical dimensions pass; the audience produces evidence-grounded, founder-actionable signal at current scale. A larger micro-simulation is mechanically sound, though source-coverage expansion remains a prerequisite for any society-scale run.

evidence_grounding_score.name: evidence_grounding_score
evidence_grounding_score.detail: 7/7 personas reasoned from source-bound evidence excerpts.

competitor_comparison_score.name: competitor_comparison_score
competitor_comparison_score.detail: 6/7 personas referenced at least one named competitor / substitute (Red Bull, Monster, Celsius, Prime, Gatorade...).

objection_specificity_score.name: objection_specificity_score
objection_specificity_score.detail: 19/21 objections carry specific markers (quantities, named ingredients/concepts) and avoid 'maybe / not sure' hedges.

caveat_integrity_score.name: caveat_integrity_score
caveat_integrity_score.detail: 4/4 required caveat markers present; product-name presence=True; brand-leakage=none.

stance_validity_score.name: stance_validity_score
stance_validity_score.detail: 7/7 personas have schema-valid internal stance; market-entry mapping invalid: 0.

debate_value_score.name: debate_value_score
debate_value_score.detail: 2 debate turns; 1 caused stance movement; 2/2 passed audit.

recommendations: Expand to a larger micro-simulation (e.g. all 21 production-retrieved included personas) for broader category coverage.
Source-coverage expansion (Brave / Reddit / YouTube) is still required before any society-scale (50+) run.
